things.name: La Concha Beach
things.description: Consistently voted one of Europe's finest city beaches, a perfect crescent of golden sand sheltered by the iconic bay promenade

things.name: Old Town (Parte Vieja)
things.description: Vibrant old quarter packed with pintxos bars, the famous food scene that has made San Sebastián Europe's culinary capital

things.name: Monte Igueldo
things.description: Hilltop viewpoint reached by a historic funicular offering the most spectacular panorama over La Concha Bay and the coastline

things.name: San Telmo Museum
things.description: Outstanding Basque cultural museum in a 16th-century Dominican convent with works by El Greco and panoramic photography

things.name: Basilica of Santa Maria del Coro
things.description: Baroque basilica of 1774 serving as the de facto cathedral of San Sebastián, overlooking the old town's main square

things.name: Bretxa Market
things.description: Traditional Basque covered market where chefs and locals shop for the world-class local produce underpinning the city's cuisine

things.name: Miramar Palace
things.description: Victorian summer palace of the Spanish royal family perched on a headland between La Concha and Ondarreta beaches

things.name: Aquarium Donostia
things.description: Modern aquarium on the harbour with a dramatic walk-through shark tunnel and exhibits on Basque maritime history

things.name: Monte Urgull
things.description: Wooded hill above the old town topped by a giant Christ statue and the ruins of Castillo de la Mota with free views over the bay

things.name: Zurriola Beach and Kursaal
things.description: Surfer's beach flanked by the twin glass cubes of the Kursaal Congress Centre, designed by Rafael Moneo and lit like lanterns at night
